title: EOG Resources: High Margins, Growth Potential, Attractive Valuation
text: EOG Resources, Inc. is one of the most high-quality exploration and production companies in the United States. The company has been heavily focused on reducing its costs and has made a great deal of progress in reducing its costs over the past few years.

title: EOG Resources Is A High Quality Operator At A Discount Valuation
text: EOG has benefitted from higher oil and gas prices but remains attractive. OPEC+ production cuts and the need to replace Russian oil and gas create a constructive environment for the E&P Sector.

title: EOG Resources A Top 25 Dividend Giant With 2.50% Yield
text: EOG Resources has been named as a Top 25 ''Dividend Giant'' by ETF Channel, with a whopping $9.77B worth of stock held by ETFs, and above-average ''DividendRank'' statistics including a strong 2.50% yield
